---
title: "Recommandations générales"
---

## UpToDate {#uptodate .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="uptodate">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.uptodate.com/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/uptodate.png" alt="UpToDate">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.uptodate.com/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">UpToDate</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Wolters Kluwer
<br><span class="outil-access payant">Accès payant / institutionnel</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## SFPC {#sfpc .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="sfpc">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.sfpc.eu/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/sfpc.png" alt="SFPC">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.sfpc.eu/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">SFPC</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Société Française de Pharmacie Clinique
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## HUG — Recommandations {#hug .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="hug">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.hug.ch/pharmacologie-clinique/recommandations" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/hug.png" alt="HUG — Recommandations">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.hug.ch/pharmacologie-clinique/recommandations" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">HUG — Recommandations</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Hôpitaux Universitaires de Genève
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
